tweets.text: #StateOnTheStreet asked the public about crucial moments in the U.S.-France relationship. From the shared history during the American Revolution and WWII to our current transatlantic defense, trade, economic, and cultural ties, we are proud allies and friends. 🇺🇸 🇫🇷 https://t.co/dY9JyKlvMU

.@SecBlinken: As Ukraine continues to seize momentum on the battlefield, President Putin has focused his ire—and his fire—on Ukraine’s civilian population. This brutalization of Ukraine’s people is barbaric. https://t.co/J5n08scWNp

At the first #SummitForDemocracy, around 100 governments committed to advance democracy, protect human rights, fight corruption, and counter authoritarianism. Building on this momentum, the second Summit will highlight the collective progress we’ve made in the #YearOfAction.
As @POTUS said, Article 5 is sacrosanct. An attack against one @NATO Ally is an attack against us all. The only time Article 5 has been invoked was after the 9/11 attacks. https://t.co/8GLCbpl75g

The U.S. government is providing over $53 million to Ukraine to support acquisition of critical electricity grid equipment. Since 2014, the United States has provided over $160 million in technical support to strengthen Ukraine’s energy security. https://t.co/0Ze7RYPG17

State visits are the highest expression of bilateral relations and there is a lot of @US_Protocol involved. .@NATO provides security for approximately one billion people in Europe and North America. NATO enlargement has furthered the U.S. goal of a Europe whole, free, and at peace. https://t.co/eebLq2ytus

Trafficking in jaguars continues despite its prohibition under the Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species (@CITES). We urge countries to adopt legislation and enforcement controls to eliminate trafficking in jaguars. #EndWildlifeTrafficking #WorldJaguarDay https://t.co/veHT08Usp0

Today on #InternationalWomenHumanRightsDefendersDay, we stand with all the brave women and girls securing human rights and fundamental freedoms for all. We continue to promote the critical role they play in advocating for human rights. https://t.co/QtZLsa0JAt

The upcoming visit of French President @EmmanuelMacron to the United States will be the first state visit of the Biden-Harris Administration. @US_Protocol Ambassador Rufus Gifford spoke with @FranceintheUS about the importance of the visit. 🇺🇸🇫🇷

As we mark 14 years since the Mumbai terrorist attacks, we honor the memory of those killed in this senseless act of violence.

Sports showcase some of the best aspects of U.S. culture. Through @ECAatState, we use sports diplomacy to foster leadership, team building, conflict resolution, as well as inclusion and equity and to champion foreign policy priorities.
